name: The Rogue's Shadow Trial
description: The Master of Shadows has a task to test your stealth and guile. Success means entry into the inner circle.

start_condition.start_hint: Find Whispering Jack in the Shadow Alley Den.

requirements.description: Only those who walk in shadows may apply.

stages.description: Locate the secret entrance to the Shadow Alley Den and convince Whispering Jack you're worth his time.

objectives.description: Use the secret guild sign to speak with Jack.

stages.description: Jack needs you to scout the 'Viper's' merchant contact in Goldenhaven to ensure he's not a spy.

objectives.description: Tail the merchant to his meeting spot.

stages.description: The merchant left a message in a dead drop. Retrieve it without being seen.

objectives.description: Retrieve the letter from the loose brick.
Pick the lock on the dead drop container.

stages.description: Jack is satisfied, but the Master needs a real demonstration. Infiltrate the Den's gauntlet and steal the Golden Viper.
Retrieve the 'Golden Viper' statuette from the vault. Watch out for the pressure plates.
Bring the statuette back to Viper herself.

objectives.description: Hand over the Golden Viper to the Master.
